title: Bridge Essay: The Neural Mechanisms of Private Speech in Second Language Learners' Oral Produc

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention.

**The Neural Mechanisms of Private Speech in Second Language Learners' Oral Production: An fNIRS Study.**. Brain sciences.. PMID: 40426622. DOI: 10.3390/brainsci15050451. Background: According to Vygotsky'ssociocultural theory, private speech functions both as atool for thought regulation and as atransitional form between outer and inner speech. However, its role in adult second language (L2) learning-and the neural mechanisms supporting it-remains insufficiently understood.
